invalid_attempts.reason: Result body was not the required JSON review; it attempted to begin tool-based exploration in prose.

p3.title: Contract validator fails closed pending cp00-092 evidence files
p3.detail: npm run rp00:control-plane:validate currently fails only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-092/{manifest.json,command-evidence.json,claude-review-result.json,adjudication.md,construction-inspection.json} are not yet present. The validator was extended to push S01-S10 into requiredClosedSubphases, advance currentContractSubphaseId to RP00.P09.M05.S10 and currentSourceMicroPhaseId to RP00.P09.M05, and require a construction inspection asserting control_plane_review_closeout_permission_audit_binding_verified===true. This is the expected pre-evidence sequencing state, not a code defect; this very review is one of the evidence artifacts that must be materialized before the validator turns green.
p3.recommendation: Create the cp00-092 evidence pack (manifest, command-evidence, claude-review-result, adjudication, construction-inspection) and re-run rp00:control-plane:validate to confirm green before pack closeout.

p3.title: blocked_claim_refs intentionally empty for this binding pack
p3.detail: result.blocked_claim_refs is fixed to [] and assertControlPlaneReviewCloseoutPermissionAuditBindingResult requires it to be an empty array. Forbidden boundary claims are rejected via thrown errors in assembleControlPlaneReviewCloseoutPermissionAuditBinding (forbidden and unknown claims both throw) rather than recorded as blocked-claim receipts. This diverges from upstream packs that emitted blocked-claim receipts, but is internally consistent and validator-enforced for a metadata-only binding with no boundary-suite execution.
p3.recommendation: No action required; confirm empty blocked_claim_refs matches the intended evidence convention for metadata-only review-closeout binding packs.

verification_performed.review_mode: read-only static review of the provided diff, plan snapshot, and generated summaries; no tools used, no files inspected, no writes performed

validation_signals.contract_validator: reported expected FAIL before evidence files exist; only missing docs/closeout-packs/cp00-092/* evidence files (see P3-CP00-092-001)

verification_performed.cross_checks: policy <-> validator asserts <-> assembler output <-> RESULT_FIELDS <-> fixture_summary <-> contract definition_summary <-> test assertions; unit/range/risk/pack-id consistency; upstream CP00-091 gate fields; full negative-capability flag set
verification_performed.diff_scale: 8 files, +3546/-7; bulk in contracts/control-plane-contract.json (+1756) and fixtures/synthetic-control-plane.json (+697), expected for contract-mirroring binding packs

1_risk_bound_10_units_not_stray_single.evidence: plan unit_count=planned_unit_count=requested_unit_count=10, deviation_from_plan=false, within_default_risk_range=true; risk_class=planned_risk_class=A. Policy unitCount=10 with UNIT_ROWS S01..S10; SUBPHASE_IDS derived from units. Validator asserts unitCount===10, includedSubphaseIds.length===10, [0]===RP00.P09.M05.S01, .at(-1)===RP00.P09.M05.S10, and includedSubphaseIds===SUBPHASE_IDS. Result/contract/fixture all carry 10 included_unit_ids S01-S10. No 1-unit drift.

2_upstream_cp00_091_handoff_enforced.evidence: Assembler requires upstream object, rejects array/non-object; enforces pack_id===planned_pack_id===CP00-091, next_subphase===RP00.P09.M05.S01, decision===hermes_validation_evidence_review_transition_bound_metadata_only, source_micro_phase_completed===true, phase_completed===false, hermes_validation_phase_completed===true, review_and_closeout_phase_started===true, review_and_closeout_opening_bound===true, plus all upstream write/runtime/approval/ldip flags false; then calls assertControlPlaneHermesValidationEvidenceReviewTransitionResult(upstream). requiredInputFields===CP00-091 RESULT_FIELDS (validator-enforced). requiredEvidenceRefs reference cp00-091 manifest/command-evidence/claude-review-result/adjudication/construction-inspection. Tests cover pack mismatch, S01 handoff drift, opening-bound drift, and object-shape guards.

3_boundaries_hold.no_write: database_write_permitted/storage_write_permitted/product_state_persistence_permitted/idempotency_record_write_permitted/runtime_lock_acquisition_permitted=false; writes_product_state=false; policy doesNotWrite* and result assert enforce all
3_boundaries_hold.no_real_data: no_real_data=true in policy/module/result/fixture; validator asserts true
3_boundaries_hold.no_product_state_persistence: product_state_persistence_permitted=false; forbidden claim persist_product_state throws; completesSourceMicroPhase/phaseCompleted false
3_boundaries_hold.no_human_approval_synthesis: human_approval_record_write_permitted/human_approval_decision_synthesized/human_approval_bypass_permitted=false; human_approval_marker_required=true and human_approval_marker_is_not_approval=true preserved; forbidden claims write_human_approval_record/synthesize_human_approval_decision/bypass_human_approval/mark_go_no_go_final_without_human_marker throw
3_boundaries_hold.failclosed_unknown_claims: any non-false claim that is neither forbidden nor known throws 'cannot accept unknown claim' (test-covered)

4_micro_phase_open_next_s11.evidence: policy.completesSourceMicroPhase=false, phaseCompleted=false, nextSubphase=RP00.P09.M05.S11; partiallyCompletedSourceMicroPhaseIds=[RP00.P09.M05] and openSourceMicroPhaseIds=[RP00.P09.M05]. Result source_micro_phase_completed=false, phase_completed=false, next_subphase=RP00.P09.M05.S11. definition_summary.closeout_contract: source_micro_phase_completed=false, phase_completed=false, next_subphase=RP00.P09.M05.S11. Validator/result-assert enforce S11. Matches scope leaving S11 as next human approval marker pack.

5_fixture_contract_test_validator_consis.evidence: fixture_summary.result_equals_contract=true, unit_count=10, included_subphase_ids S01-S10. Test 'fixture mirrors policy' validates suiteFixture.result via assert and checks pack/planned/requested ids and next_subphase. Test 'contract mirrors policy lists' deep-equals definition included_subphase_ids/unit_titles/source_micro_phase_ids/phase_ids/required_input_fields/result_fields/required_evidence_refs/acceptance_gate_ids/forbidden_boundary_suite_claims/fail_closed_on/review_question_contracts to policy, asserts definition.result, and deep-equals definition.result===fixture result; closeout_contract production_ready_flag and next_subphase verified. Validator length-locks resultFields and forbids extra result keys (Object.keys sort equality). Reported 913 tests PASS. result_field_count=112 consistent.

6_ldip_planning_only_not_implemented.evidence: policy.ldipPlanningGateRef=docs/ldip-integration/ldip-overlay-closeout-pack-map.json; ldipImplementationAllowed=false; result.ldip_planning_gate_ref set and ldip_implementation_allowed=false; failClosedOn includes ldip_implementation_claim; acceptance gate ldip_planning_gate_referenced_without_implementation; result.result_flags ldip not present as implemented. No LDIP implementation surface introduced (the untracked docs/ldip-integration/claude-review-results/* file is outside this pack and not part of the diff).

supplemental.deliverable_types_match_plan: pass — UNIT_ROWS deliverableType S01/S02=claude_review, S03/S04=security_audit, S05=test, S06=ui, S07-S10=implementation match plan included_units
supplemental.result_frozen_and_sealed: pass — result and nested arrays Object.frozen; review_question_contracts (10) and per-family contracts (permission_bypass/audit_completeness/missing_test/ui_leak/downstream_readiness/risk_register/severity_taxonomy/go_no_go_verdict_format) present with metadata_only=true, no_real_data=true, p0_p1_unresolved_allowed=false, p2_requires_fix_or_defer=true
supplemental.tenant_and_matter_trace: pass — tenant_id/actor_id/actor_tenant_id/resource_tenant_id/matter_id/matter_tenant_id required as trimmed nonblank strings; tenant_boundary_required and matter_trace_required true
supplemental.phase_accounting: pass — completedPhaseIds=[RP00.P08], hermes_validation_phase_completed=true, review_and_closeout_phase_started=true; completedSourceMicroPhaseIds inherited from CP00-091 and validator confirms inclusion of RP00.P09.M04
supplemental.readme_changelog_entry: pass — README adds accurate CP00-092 entry with exports, plan binding, Risk A cursor correction CP00-091->CP00-092, metadata-only contract list, full no-* boundary list, and next boundary RP00.P09.M05.S11
